name: Bryl Lim
title: Principal AI Engineer
bio: Bryl Lim is a Principal AI Engineer at Standard Chartered, a major banking institution headquartered in London, England. In this role, he focuses on leveraging artificial intelligence solutions to enhance the bank's operations and services. Standard Chartered is known for its global presence and commitment to innovation in the banking sector, particularly in integrating advanced technologies like AI and cloud computing to optimize processes and improve customer experiences.
